sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the history to see when the green center moved
print("=== Checking history for green center movement ===")
for i, entry in enumerate(history):
    frame = entry.frame
    lines = frame.ascii.split('\n')
    for r in range(38, 44):
        row_str = lines[r][0:32]
        if 'NN' in row_str:
            print(f"Step {entry.action}, Frame {i}: Green center at row {r}, col {row_str.index('NN')}")
            break

# Let me also check the current state of the green center
print("\n=== Current green center position ===")
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(38, 44):
    row_str = lines[r][0:32]
    if 'NN' in row_str:
        print(f"Green center at row {r}, col {row_str.index('NN')}")

# Now let me try moving the green center with directional keys
print("\n=== Trying DOWN to move green center ===")
action(['DOWN'])

lines_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("After DOWN:")
for r in range(38, 44):
    row_str = lines_after[r][0:32]
    if 'NN' in row_str:
        print(f"Green center at row {r}, col {row_str.index('NN')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
